title: Mike Haynie to take over at Syracuse University sooner than expected (Good Morning CNY)
summary: Mike Haynie's transition to leadership at Syracuse University is occurring ahead of schedule. This leadership change at a major regional institution may have implications for Syracuse's innovation ecosystem and university-community partnerships.
